step.name: transcribe
step.action: Run Whisper / Deepgram per file; emit text + word timestamps.

step.name: code-per-interview
step.action: Agent extracts coded snippets per interview with quote anchors.

step.name: synthesise-themes
step.action: Cluster + merge into cross-interview themes with occurrence_count.

step.name: human-spot-check
step.action: Sample ≥10 % of themes; mark agree / disagree / revise.
